# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

default:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq

.gitlab_mr_meta: &gitlab_mr_meta |
  if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
    MR_TITLE="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    MR_DESCRIPTION="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  else
    MR_TITLE="$(git log -1 --pretty=%s)"
    MR_DESCRIPTION="$(git log -1 --pretty=%b)"
  fi
  export MR_TITLE MR_DESCRIPTION
  SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+|-+$//g; s/-+/-/g')"
  export SAFE_MR_TITLE
  SHORT_SHA="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)}"
  export SHORT_SHA

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - *gitlab_mr_meta
    - echo "Building for: $MR_TITLE"
    - printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION" > mr_description.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - mr_description.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - *gitlab_mr_meta
    - echo "Testing feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 200
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

package:
  stage: package
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - *gitlab_mr_meta
    - PACKAGE_VERSION="${SAFE_MR_TITLE:-release}-${SHORT_SHA}"
    - export PACKAGE_VERSION
    - echo "PACKAGE_VERSION=$PACKAGE_VERSION" > package.env
    - echo "Release notes:"
    - if [ -f mr_description.txt ]; then cat mr_description.txt; fi
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: package.env
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: package
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - *gitlab_mr_meta
    - DEPLOY_TAG="${SAFE_MR_TITLE:-release}-${SHORT_SHA}"
    - export DEPLOY_TAG
    - echo "Deploying tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deploying: $MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG"
    - |
      COMMIT_MESSAGE="deploy(${SAFE_MR_TITLE:-release}): ${MR_TITLE}

      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}

      Release tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      git commit --allow-empty -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE"
      git push origin HEAD:$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
  environment:
    name: production/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: manual
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

notify:
  stage: notify
  needs:
    - job: deploy
      optional: true
    - job: package
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - *gitlab_mr_meta
    - |
      RELEASE_NOTES="$(cat mr_description.txt 2>/dev/null || printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION")"
      PAYLOAD=$(jq -n \
        --arg title "$MR_TITLE" \
        --arg description "$RELEASE_NOTES" \
        --arg sha "$SHORT_SHA" \
        --arg tag "${SAFE_MR_TITLE:-release}-${SHORT_SHA}" \
        --arg project "$CI_PROJECT_PATH" \
        '{
          project: $project,
          title: $title,
          description: $description,
          sha: $sha,
          tag: $tag,
          message: ("Deployed: " + $title + " (" + $tag + ")")
        }')
      echo "$PAYLOAD"
      if [ -n "$NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$PAYLOAD" "$NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
